attributes.descriptionText: Mister Toosa is currently in foster care and ready for adoption via our virtual process!Mister Toosa, an 11-year-old male, just arrived and is still getting settled in, so weâ€™re just beginning to learn who they are. Right now, everything is newâ€”new people, new sounds, new routinesâ€”and weâ€™re giving them time to relax, decompress, and show us their true personality at their own pace.Hereâ€™s what we know so far about his time in foster care: https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:VA6C2:5e1b812e-202f-4c7c-8957-f0bf1836e6abHe is a handsome guy with a unique look from his crinkled ear. He is a total charmer. His foster says "Mister Toosa is the sweetest, cuddliest boy! Almost immediately upon coming to his foster home, he was exploring and making himself comfortable. He warms up quickly and loves to be near you, whether it's climbing into your lap for a nap or lying by your feet while cooking dinner. As a senior citizen, he is definitely more low-key and really just enjoys the finer things in life like his naps, belly rubs, and treats. He's a cuddle bug! He loves to be either right in your lap, on your legs or at least right beside you. When he's comfy on the couch, he loves to flop over on to his back and show off his belly with his paws in the air! And when he's in a comfy, deep sleep, he has the cutest little snore."He is neutered, vaccinated, microchipped, and has had preventative treatments to ensure he is ready for his next steps.Submit an adoption survey from above and our team will reach out via phone or email (check spam) to schedule a counseling call. For any additional questions, please contact fosternyc@bestfriends.org.Please remember, pets cannot be held or reserved.

attributes.descriptionHtml:
Abby is a very beautiful black female cat who gets along with other cats, enjoys playing with toys and would love ❤️ to chill and watch TV with you.  If you are looking for a companion,

Abby is the one!  ‍⬛

Abby is spayed, fully dewormed, fully vaccinated, FELV/FIV negative and microchipped.

 If you are interested, you can e-mail AASNAdoptions@gmail.com or text 516-984-4525 to make an appointment.

attributes.descriptionHtml:
Susan is a very cute and adorable black female with black whiskers.  She has big expressive eyes.  Will you help Susan find her forever home?

All kittens / cats are spayed/neutered, dewormed, vaccinated, FELV/FIV negative and microchipped.

If you are interested, you can either e-mail AASNAdoptions@gmail.com or text or call 516-984-4525 to make an appointment. All About Spay Neuter's adoption center is located at 4209 Merrick Road, Massapequa, NY.

attributes.descriptionHtml:
Milo is coming back due to aggression toward the other cat in the house. He was adopted in June 2020 and all seemed fine at first, it had gotten worse over the year. He is a very affection cat, but needs to be the only cat in the household July 8, 2021.

Rescued from a feral colony in East Orange in near zero temperatures with frostbite.
